What is Ziny Proxy? Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and

Daniel Cole

Daniel Cole helps people turn complex proxy questions into simple, actionable answers. With 7+ years of experience in SEO and the proxy industry, Daniel writes every blog post at Ziny Proxy with one goal: to help you make better, informed decisions when it comes to scraping, automation, privacy, and performance.

He understands the challenges users face whether you're a developer scaling tasks, a marketer avoiding bans, or someone simply looking for secure browsing. Every guide, tip, and review he writes is based on real-world experience and up to date industry knowledge.

If you’re serious about using proxies the smart way, Daniel’s articles here at Ziny is the place to start.
